# Statuses for GCC libstdc++ configure defines discovered in
# libstdc++-v3/acinclude.m4, linkage.m4, configure.ac, crossconfig.m4, and
# selected GCC top-level config macros.
#
# probe-modeled: represented by a compile or link probe in the Bazel port.
# policy-modeled: represented by a Bazel policy, target decision, or fixed value.
# not-needed: configure-only define intentionally irrelevant to the Bazel port.
# header-probe: represented by the generated _HEADER_CHECKS normalization.
# target-derived: selected from target/platform rules rather than a probe.
# build-setting-later: currently fixed/defaulted; keep as a future knob.
# intentionally-defaulted: deliberately left undefined for supported targets.
# unsupported-feature: optional libstdc++ feature not built by this port today.
# unsupported-target: target family not supported by this libstdc++ port today.
# Optional third column: version condition for the currently supported GCC versions.
HAVE_ACOSF probe-modeled
HAVE_ACOSL probe-modeled
HAVE_ALIGNED_ALLOC probe-modeled
HAVE_ARC4RANDOM probe-modeled gcc_ge_12
HAVE_ASINF probe-modeled
HAVE_ASINL probe-modeled
HAVE_AS_SYMVER_DIRECTIVE policy-modeled
HAVE_ATAN2F probe-modeled
HAVE_ATAN2L probe-modeled
HAVE_ATANF probe-modeled
HAVE_ATANL probe-modeled
HAVE_ATOMIC_LOCK_POLICY target-derived
HAVE_AT_QUICK_EXIT probe-modeled
HAVE___CXA_THREAD_ATEXIT probe-modeled
HAVE___CXA_THREAD_ATEXIT_IMPL probe-modeled
HAVE_C99_FLT_EVAL_TYPES probe-modeled gcc_ge_14
HAVE_CEILF probe-modeled
HAVE_CEILL probe-modeled
HAVE_COSF probe-modeled
HAVE_COSHF probe-modeled
HAVE_COSHL probe-modeled
HAVE_COSL probe-modeled
HAVE_DIRFD probe-modeled gcc_ge_11_5
HAVE_DECL_STRNLEN probe-modeled gcc_ge_12
HAVE_EXCEPTION_PTR_SINCE_GCC46 policy-modeled
HAVE_EXPF probe-modeled
HAVE_EXPL probe-modeled
HAVE_FABSF probe-modeled
HAVE_FABSL probe-modeled
HAVE_FINITE probe-modeled
HAVE_FINITEF probe-modeled
HAVE_FINITEL probe-modeled
HAVE_FDOPENDIR probe-modeled gcc_ge_11_5
HAVE_FPCLASS probe-modeled
HAVE_FLOORF probe-modeled
HAVE_FLOORL probe-modeled
HAVE_FMODF probe-modeled
HAVE_FMODL probe-modeled
HAVE_FREXPF probe-modeled
HAVE_FREXPL probe-modeled

HAVE_GETENTROPY probe-modeled gcc_ge_12
HAVE_GETIPINFO policy-modeled

HAVE_HYPOT probe-modeled
HAVE_HYPOTF probe-modeled
HAVE_HYPOTL probe-modeled
HAVE_ICONV probe-modeled

HAVE_POWF probe-modeled
HAVE_POWL probe-modeled
